programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A painter with strange visions who lives in an old cottage is visited by a warlock who used to live there But his arrival wakes an ancient beast buried far below the cottage

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Three construction workers find a hidden cave with treasure guarded by a troll

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: During a camping trip the men begin to wonder if their female tracker is a vampire Meanwhile two plane crash survivors whove been feasting on dead passengers are on the verge of rescue when an escaped killer intervenes

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hong 110
programme.desc: Hong 110

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: In Seine

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Warlords - Hitler vs Stalin
programme.desc: The personalities and spectres of Adolf Hitler and Joseph Stalin loom large in the events of the twentieth Century They were similar in some respects and yet very different in others

programme.title: The Gravest Military Mistakes In History- Tin Soldiers
programme.desc: 20th Century beliefs that a new military technology would bring about cleaner wars and reduce casualties are confounded in this look at modern warfare from the Battle of the Somme to the Gulf War

programme.title: The Forgotten War Between Britain And The USA
programme.desc: In June 1812 the United States of America declared war on Britain and invaded its colony of Upper Canada Britain was already locked in a life and death struggle with Napoleon in Europe leaving Upper Canada poorly defended and vulnerable to attack

programme.title: The USS Enterprise and the Battle of Midway
programme.desc: After expanding the war in the Pacific to include western outposts the Japanese Empire had attained its initial strategic goals quickly taking British Hong Kong the Philippines British Malaya Singapore and the Dutch East Indies modern Indonesia The Dutch East Indies with its vital oil resources was particularly important to Japan Because of this preliminary planning for the second phase of operations commenced as early as January 1942

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Knight 321
programme.desc: Knight 321

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A hot-rod racer uses a cursed necklace to win events by killing his competition and dipping the chain in his victims blood

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys expect company Kates pickle-brained ex-beau and his wife

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: When US athletes are injured Hymie turns into a one man track team to help the US win

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A KAOS operative imitating the President calls the Chief He orders the Chief to step down and gives the Chiefs job to Max KAOS also infiltrates CONTROL by planting their man Brady to CONTROL

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Theres a noisy new neighbor in the hood and her name is Zsa Zsa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols dad comes to visit for the first time and Mister Ed has a hot date so he visits the local car wash to get a good shower

programme.title: Hogans 321
programme.desc: Hogans 321

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Mchale 408
programme.desc: Mchale 408

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Hercules 209
programme.desc: Hercules 209

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will starts dating a girl from a carnival Her boss who is manipulating the young carnies wants to sacrifice Will to the forces of darkness in a scam to keep his young work force in line

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A boyish Pied Piper leads teenaged girls into prostitution His gentle manner makes his girls willing victims- and hides the fact that he has also committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Stagge City pop 407 and is promptly arrested on trumped-up vagrant charges After a trial lasting less then a minute hes sentenced to 90 days hard-labor at the nearby silver mine - owned by Stagge

programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: After retiring from his wrestling career Sean Quinn still wanted to compete. He viewed his discovery of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu as a natural progression to MMA. As Sean takes us through his day, we see life from the perspective of somebody who doesn't like to rely on others. Inspired by his own childhood in which he did not have access to a gym and coaching, he has turned that around, becoming a coach and owning his own gym.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun
